
### revisiting an earlier example (1)  {.smaller}


```
char *array;
posix_memalign(&array, CACHE_SIZE, CACHE_SIZE);
LoadIntoCache(array, CACHE_SIZE);
if (mystery) {
    *pointer += 1;
}
if (TimeAccessTo(&array[index]) > THRESHOLD) {
    /* pointer accessed */
}

```
 

* what if mystery is false <i>but</i> branch mispredicted?


### revisiting an earlier example (2) 

<!-- \lstset{language=myasm} -->
 ![](/spectre/texfig/lookup-spec-cache-access-revisiting-an-earlier-example-2.figure.svg)


### avoiding/triggering this problem 


```
if (something false) {
    access *pointer;
}

```
 

* what can we do to make access more/less likely to happen?
